caption: A presentation slide displays information about the Cromwell Court Apartments in Barnstable. To the left, a photograph shows the apartment complex's sign, "CROMWELL COURT APARTMENTS", located at "168", surrounded by a flowerbed of red, pink, and white blossoms. To the right, a white background features a list of facts: "Barnstable", "Cromwell Court Apartments", "124 units of affordable family rental housing", "Built in 1973. Acquired & rehabilitated in 2011.", and "$500,000 CPA funds". A small video inset in the top right corner shows a person speaking. Across the bottom of the screen, a yellow banner contains the word "Acquire". The scene remains static across all frames, with no changes in the text, images, or the person in the video inset.
